Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ninecloud Soul]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Ninecloud Soul is the voice of the Ninecloud Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Ninecloud Soul is a voice that announces participants in the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Ninecloud Soul announces the teams and cults.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — The Ninecloud Soul is a professional announcer for the Ninecloud Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — The Ninecloud Soul brought up Lindon's image five times.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — The Ninecloud Soul shouted Lindon's name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — The Ninecloud Soul delivers prizes and information to participants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — The Ninecloud Soul is a rainbow light that communicates with participants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — The Ninecloud Soul refers to Lindon as number eleven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — The Ninecloud Soul refers to Yerin as number ten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — The Ninecloud Soul is a feminine spirit that produces floating models and communicates via rainbow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Ninecloud Soul is a voice that spoke from within rainbow light to congratulate Mercy and Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Ninecloud Soul provides information regarding the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — The Ninecloud Soul announced the result of the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — The Ninecloud Soul has a beautiful voice and emits rainbow light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — The Ninecloud Soul reacted excitedly to Yerin's actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Ninecloud Soul announced Yerin's victory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Ninecloud Soul announced that sixteen competitors remain in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — The Ninecloud Soul replays fight highlights and follows matches with entertainment.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The Ninecloud Soul makes public announcements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — The Ninecloud Soul declared victory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — The Ninecloud Soul announced Yan Shoumei's victory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — The Ninecloud Soul announces the names of the fighters in the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Ninecloud Soul introduces the candidates for the Uncrowned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Ninecloud Soul reintroduced and celebrated Eithan’s accomplishments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Ninecloud Soul coordinates every construct in the Ninecloud Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — The Ninecloud Soul may bring items to Ziel's room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — The Ninecloud Soul announced the victory of Akura Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Ninecloud Soul replayed moments from Mercy’s three fights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Ninecloud Soul is mad at Lindon and has him locked in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Ninecloud Soul manifests as a beam of rainbow light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Ninecloud Soul announced the prizes for the fighters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin did not hear the Ninecloud Soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Ninecloud Soul's voice announced the eighteenth Uncrowned King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Ninecloud Soul is described as being quite busy.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Ninecloud Soul announces winners in the arena.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
